target_audience: US-based 18-35 Gen Z and Millennials navigating breakups, dating confusion, situationships, self-worth, and emotional growth
voice_persona: The honest friend who's been through it. Not a therapist, not a guru, not a hype coach.

fonts.primary: DM Serif Display for hooks, titles, and emotional statements
fonts.secondary: Inter for body copy, labels, captions, and UI text

visual_style.description: Cinematic stock footage plus kinetic text overlays. Faceless to start. Moody editorial, slightly desaturated warm tones, golden-hour light, intimate close-ups.

text_overlay_rules.hook: DM Serif Display style, large, Soft Cream or white, centered
text_overlay_rules.scrim: Always add a dark semi-transparent scrim behind text if background is light
text_overlay_rules.motion: Hook text fades in. Key insight snaps in with slight scale-up. Key phrases get their own screen moment.

content_pillars.relationship_patterns: Why we choose who we choose: attachment styles, red flags, situationships, love bombing.
content_pillars.psychology_drops: Bite-sized psych concepts made digestible: trauma bonding, nervous system, projection.
content_pillars.healing_arcs: Breakup recovery, moving on, reclaiming yourself.
content_pillars.identity_and_growth: Who you're becoming: reinvention and self-aware habits.

content_formats.reframe: A common belief dismantled, landing a more nuanced truth.
content_formats.specific_scenario: A painfully specific emotional scenario viewers feel called out by.
content_formats.list: 3-5 signs or things, each point gets its own text moment.
content_formats.hot_take: Controversial opinion, once per week max.
content_formats.psychology_drop: A digestible psychology concept without clinical heaviness.

write_like: You didn't lose him. You lost the version of him you made up.
That's not love. That's hope with someone else's face on it.
Your nervous system is still trying to protect you from them.
Soft does not mean weak. It just means you stopped performing for people.
never_say: In today's video, we're going to talk about...
It's so important to validate your feelings.
Remember: you are enough! Love yourself first!
Hi guys, hope you're doing well, so basically...
